title: phebalium stenophyllum
intro: Phebalium stenophyllum, also known as the Tasmanian blue peppermint bush, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae. This plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Phebalium stenophyllum include relieving digestive issues, reducing fever, and soothing respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Phebalium stenophyllum include teas and infusions, which can be made by steeping the leaves in hot water to release its medicinal properties.
